# Roadmap

## Purpose

This document summarizes the current product direction.

For the complete roadmap, see:

- Docs/Roadmap.md

---

## Current Status

Current Version

- Version 1

Current Sprint

- Sprint 2.4 – Documentation & AI Workspace

Current Focus

- Complete project documentation
- AI-assisted development environment
- Stable architecture
- Premium Design System

---

## Next Priorities

After Sprint 2.4:

- Resume functional development
- Continue My Space improvements
- Portfolio module
- OCR integration
- Search improvements
- Authentication
- Cloud synchronization
- Notifications

---

## Long-Term Vision

Praxis360 evolves incrementally.

Every Sprint delivers one complete feature while improving:

- Product quality
- Documentation
- Architecture
- AI development environment

---

## Rules

Always:

- Respect the Roadmap.
- Complete the current Sprint before starting another.
- Prioritize long-term maintainability over short-term speed.
